sevenDay.synopsis: We're seeing quite a bit of cloud cover this morning, but the entire LFA is VFR and NEG hazards are anticipated. This will be the case thru the end of the training week. Showers and ISOLD TS return for Saturday, especially the PM and early N1 periods. IFR sets up for Sunday AM. Rain chances will stick around thru the forecast period.
sevenDay.title: 7-DAY OUTLOOK: 22 APR - 28 APR
